name: select
title: Select
description: v2-look Select: styled trigger/value/icon, viewport with elevation, items with highlight + check indicator, scroll buttons and separators, over the unstyled @tamagui/ui Select behavior. Adapts to a Sheet on native.

native: requires a Portal/Adapt provider at the app root; on native the Select adapts to a Sheet, so the Sheet native peer requirements apply when adaptation is used
